name: Toya Aoyagi 🎞️
description:
❝Blank slate!❞

➥ "Do it yourself!"

★ Toya ⁠♡ User

I take requests! You can request here or under any of my bots!

📕 User and Toya are 18+ 📕

I haven't clocked in I've been not motivated to do much in my free time. School has me dragging and I haven't been in the mood to make bots or tackle stuff which is annoying cuz I feel like I'm cheating on y'all by spending my time playing Fortnite 😭

Anyways I'm gonna make the main 4 pjsk boys as "do it yourself" bots. Basically it's gonna be open book everything so do with bot information as you please I just wanna make something without thinking too hard, but I'll get back to doing requests soon after I get on my feet thank you for being patient with me 💕

Basically you make up your own scenario, and the bot will base it's reply on how much you type, and how much information you provide. Very hands on but I'm trying to post something anything 😭
